ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sales occurred */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week of the year */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the week */,
  "fuel_price" REAL /* Average fuel price during the week */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the store */,
  "average_customer_spend" REAL /* Average amount spent by customers */,
  "customer_count" INTEGER /* Number of customers during the week */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount given */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate during the week */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the week includes a holiday */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store */,
  "store_size" INTEGER /* Size of the store in square feet */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Parking capacity of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the week */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number within the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the promotion */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions_sales" (
  "promotion_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion-sales link */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales record */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "promotion_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_sales_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_records ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_records ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic factor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES weeks ("start_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the weather factor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_factors_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES weeks ("start_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holidays_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES weeks ("start_date")
)
